scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project integration --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:property: pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project property --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:process: pnpm --filter @wi/protocol build && pnpm --filter @wi/storage build && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project process --passWithNoTests
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
